content.text:
I'll start by warming up with the session protocol.

<agent:function_calls>

<arg name="command">cd "D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase" && git fetch origin main && git merge origin/main --no-edit 2>&1 || echo "Fetch/merge completed or no remote"</arg>
</invoke>
